severityChanges.reason: Attack matrix redirects artifact roots but did not prove a non-empty case writes outside the resolver-computed artifact root under the iteration escalation rule.

findingDetails.title: Live runtime uses stale generated code-graph scope globs after plural rename
findingDetails.recommendation: Rebuild mcp_server/dist and add release guards for singular root literals in generated runtime outputs.

findingDetails.title: Command YAML sk-deep-* drift in auto-mode deep-loop workflows
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace sk-deep-review/sk-deep-research with deep-review/deep-research in auto workflow assets and dry-run both commands.

findingDetails.title: Skill advisor source still writes .opencode/skill/.advisor-state
findingDetails.recommendation: Move advisor state to a plural or neutral cache path and add a root singular-directory guard.

findingDetails.title: Packet 096 validation failure localizes to parent and 004-symlinks anchor/doc sufficiency defects
findingDetails.recommendation: Repair parent and child validation defects, then rerun recursive strict validation.

findingDetails.title: Claude Stop hook executes an env-selected autosave script before canonical path validation
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove production env script override or require test-only gating plus realpath containment.

findingDetails.title: Completed packets still have all required checklist evidence unchecked
findingDetails.recommendation: Backfill checklist marks with concrete evidence citations or relabel packets as not completion-verified.

findingDetails.title: OpenCode deep-loop leaf-agent mirrors still cite non-existent sk-deep-* skill paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Patch OpenCode deep-review/deep-research agent bodies to .opencode/skills/deep-* and verify mirrors.

findingDetails.title: Codex @review mirror weakens the P1 blocking contract
findingDetails.recommendation: Align Codex review.toml with shared doctrine that unresolved P1 fixes block pass recommendations unless explicitly deferred.

findingDetails.title: Packet 096 active specs were bulk-rewritten into plural-to-plural requirements
findingDetails.recommendation: Restore old-root literals in source-state prose and add a tautology grep guard.

findingDetails.title: Active orchestrator routing table still names non-existent sk-deep-research
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace sk-deep-research with deep-research and verify orchestrator mirrors.

findingDetails.title: Confirm-mode deep-loop command workflows also invoke retired sk-deep-* paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Patch confirm and auto command workflow assets together, then dry-run both modes.

findingDetails.title: Deep-loop artifact resolver accepts malformed spec_folder values
findingDetails.recommendation: Reject malformed and symlinked spec_folder values before artifact resolution and enforce realpath containment under .opencode/specs/.

findingDetails.title: User-facing setup docs still teach singular .opencode/agent/ and .opencode/command/ paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Update active setup docs to plural paths.

findingDetails.title: Generated dist tests and fixtures retain singular path fixtures
findingDetails.recommendation: Rebuild generated tests and classify legacy fixtures explicitly.

findingDetails.title: Additional active setup and Barter helper files still carry singular root paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Update active setup docs and Barter root helpers or mark Barter root out of scope.

findingDetails.title: Deep-review YAML documents a Copilot target-authority guard that is not implemented or wired in the executor schema
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove dead Copilot branch or implement/export buildCopilotPromptArg with malformed spec_folder tests.

findingDetails.title: Two retained-RCAF cli-opencode prompts are malformed by nested backticks
findingDetails.recommendation: Escape/remove inner backticks or use a delimiter that keeps the prompt field parseable.

findingDetails.title: Packet 093 specs still claim universal RCAF after packet 094 naturalized those playbooks
findingDetails.recommendation: Add supersession notes pointing to packet 094's ADR.

findingDetails.title: Setup guide skill inventory still advertises retired sk-deep-* names
findingDetails.recommendation: Update setup guide skill inventory to deep-research/deep-review and reconcile summary counts.

findingDetails.title: Generated dist drift is broader than code-graph/tests-only framing
findingDetails.recommendation: Rebuild the whole mcp_server/dist tree and run a generated-artifact singular-root grep with allowlists.
